summary: This document outlines the strategic vision and business model for KeepMeCompany, an AI startup focused on optimizing UK GP practices. It details the operational problems in primary care, the proposed AI-driven solution, and the founding team's background in tech scaling. The text also covers market opportunities, funding requirements, and the transition from pay-per-task to subscription models.
